caption: A high-angle wide shot captures a large, ornate assembly hall with curved wooden paneling and high ceilings featuring illuminated panels. The room is filled with people seated in tiered rows of green chairs. Many of the attendees are wearing white shirts, and some appear to be wearing academic or ceremonial gowns. The people are seated and facing forward, seemingly listening to a presentation or ceremony. The camera slowly pans and tilts, shifting the perspective of the audience and the architectural elements of the room. Between the frames, the movement is minimal, primarily a slight shift in angle that reveals more of the seating area in the foreground and the decorative panels along the walls. There is no visible on-screen text or logos present in the scene.
